## Epic 1 — Core Mechanics (#13)

**Dependency:** #12
**Est. Effort:** Small

### Goal
Design the critical hit and fumble subsystem — the high-drama moments that make 3d6 resolution exciting.

### Critical Hits (Three natural 6s)
- Probability: 1/216 (≈0.46%) — rare enough to be special
- Automatic Strong result regardless of modifiers
- Bonus effect options (pick one or design table):
  - Maximize damage (all damage dice roll max)
  - Inflict a condition (stunned, knocked prone, disarmed)
  - Gain an immediate bonus action or free move
  - Recover 1 spent resource (DP, once-per-fight ability)
  - Narrative flourish (something cool happens)

### Fumbles (Three natural 1s)
- Probability: 1/216 — same rarity
- Automatic failure regardless of modifiers
- Complication options:
  - Weapon jam/drop (recover with action)
  - Spell backfires (minor self-damage or wild magic)
  - Opponent gains advantage on next action against you
  - Equipment damage (armor die steps down, etc.)
  - Narrative complication (reinforcements arrive, alarm sounds)

### Tasks
- [ ] Design critical hit bonus table (d6 table of options)
- [ ] Design fumble complication table (d6 table of options)
- [ ] Define how crits/fumbles interact with "attacks always hit"
- [ ] Define whether NPCs/monsters also crit/fumble
- [ ] Write this into chapter 06 (or as its own section)
- [ ] Include probability math explanation for DAs
